title: Hellim's Glowing Textures
description: This resource pack gives animated glowing effect to suitable blocks.
body:
![**Hellim Projects**](https://i.imgur.com/ahjqOjf.png)
![Decoration](https://i.imgur.com/bvjfSgy.png)
![**Hellim Projects - Hellim's Glowing Textures**](https://i.imgur.com/eC0TUxP.png)

![About ResourcePack](https://i.imgur.com/W9JLdRn.png)

**Hellim Projects - Hellim's Glowing Textures**

This resource pack gives animated or non-animated glowing effect to suitable blocks and Mobs. We also planned to add this effect to more thing.

❗This ResourcePacks requires Optifine or Sodium with Indium Mod.

- Optifine
- Sodium
- Indium

![Compatible Blocks](https://i.imgur.com/kFVbwEX.png)

<details>
<summary>Block List!</summary>

- All Ores

</details>

![Compatible Mobs](https://i.imgur.com/wboPPVn.png)

<details>
<summary>Mob List!</summary>

- Drowned Zombie
- Enderman
- Glow Squid
- Iron Golem
- Spiders
- Warden

</details>

❗You can suggest blocks or mobs for us to add to Resourcepack. For this, come to our Discord server or comment.❗

![Decoration](https://i.imgur.com/L9r1AOf.png)

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/mpWY7KM.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=502)
